task:
Do two things:

(A) Create a Python shell history file at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/python_history.txt. The file must exist and contain at least 40 bytes of text (for example, a few lines of Python like 'import renderdoc as rd', 'ctx = pyrenderdoc', 'print(len(ctx.CurDrawcalls()))').

(B) Edit the RenderDoc UI configuration at /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document) and set the key "PythonShell_AutoLoad" to true so that the next qrenderdoc session automatically loads saved Python shell state.

The top-level "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must still be present after saving UI.config. Do not remove or rename any other key.

verification.description: History file is at least 40 bytes
